_comment: Spiritual Energy Sea (灵气之海) — regions of pure condensed spiritual energy forming a luminous sea within the Cave World. Canon: between cultivation planets, spiritual energy condenses into vast luminous oceans. Cultivators can absorb energy from these seas (similar to meditation near spirit veins). The 'water' is actually liquid spiritual energy — glowing cyan-white. The ground beneath is smooth, polished stone (formation-created). Temperature is mild. Features: sea_pickle stand-ins for luminous energy clusters on the 'seabed'. No structures — this is raw energy, not settled territory.
